summary: Tested 7 UI/UX fixes from user's document. Backend API tests 100% passed. Frontend UI testing revealed that FIX 5 (Remove My Team from Profile) is NOT implemented - My Team section is still visible on Profile page.

ui_bugs.issue: FIX 5 NOT IMPLEMENTED: 'My Team' section is still displayed on Mom's Profile page. Should be removed per requirements.
FIX 7b PARTIAL: 'Shared with: [providers]' text not displayed. Only shows 'automatically shared with providers on your team' without listing specific providers.

issues: FIX 6: Provider profile photos show default icons, not actual photos. This may be expected if providers haven't uploaded photos, but should verify provider_picture field is being returned from API.

action_items: FIX 5 (CRITICAL): Remove 'My Team' section from Mom's Profile page (frontend/app/(mom)/profile.tsx) - currently still showing team members with View buttons
FIX 7b (MEDIUM): Update Birth Plan page to show 'Shared with: [provider names]' instead of generic message
FIX 6 (VERIFY): Confirm providers have profile_picture_url in database - if not, default icons are expected behavior
critical_code_review_comments: Profile page (profile.tsx) still contains My Team section code around lines 350-450 - this should be removed per Fix 5
Birth plan 'Shared with' code exists at lines 280-290 but shows generic message instead of provider list when no accepted share requests exist
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Focus on Fix 5 - need to verify My Team section is removed from Profile page. Check profile.tsx for remnant code. Also verify Fix 7b shows actual provider names, not just generic 'automatically shared' message.

fix_status_summary.FIX_1_Profile_Photo_Header: PASS - Profile avatar displays in header top-right, showing user's photo if available
fix_status_summary.FIX_3_Native_Date_Picker: PASS - Profile page uses native <input type='date'> for web
fix_status_summary.FIX_4_Birth_Plan_Sync: PASS - Backend API correctly syncs due_date and birth_setting from Birth Plan to Profile
fix_status_summary.FIX_5_Remove_My_Team_From_Profile: FAIL - My Team section is STILL visible on Profile page
fix_status_summary.FIX_6_Provider_Photos_In_Team: PARTIAL - Code exists to display photos but providers showing default icons (may be expected if no photos uploaded)
fix_status_summary.FIX_7a_Remove_Share_Card_Home: PASS - 'Share Your Birth Plan' card removed from Mom Home page
fix_status_summary.FIX_7b_Shared_With_Display: PARTIAL - Shows 'automatically shared' text but not specific provider names
fix_status_summary.FIX_7c_View_Birth_Plan_Button: PASS - Code exists, couldn't test as Doula has no clients
